projects_description: A showcase of my web development projects, highlighting modern, functional websites built with current frameworks and best practices.
project1_description: An e-commerce website built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS, designed for performance and a smooth user experience.
project1_details: Full-stack e-commerce platform built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS. Designed with a clean architecture, reusable components, and structured layout to simulate a real-world online store.
projects_coming_description: More exciting projects are currently in progress.
